//: FrontierFuse Option B workflow guardrail for Claude Code (manual install-hooks path). `python3 frontier_dispatch.py install-hooks` merges these into ~/.claude/settings.json automatically (replacing <REPO> with the repo's absolute path as one literal args element) and makes a .json.bak backup. Shown here for reference / manual install. Fully restart Claude Code after install/uninstall so hooks load. Inert until `frontier-dispatch arm --gate "…"` freezes verifier argv/cwd; snapshot-bound Stop verification is a host-bound workflow guardrail, not a sandbox. Kill-switch FRONTIER_GUARDS_OFF=1 (or CLAUDE_GUARDS_OFF=1). Handlers use official Claude Code exec form: command=python3, args=[one script path], timeout=10 — aligned with hooks/hooks.json.
